pageContext.name: Be@rbrick MUVEIL "Strawberry" 100% & 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy present the Be@rbrick MUVEIL 'Strawberry' 100% & 400% Collectible Set!  Standing at approximately 2.75' and 11.02' tall, this Be@rbrick set features a print of strawberries from MUVEIL's famous line.  Don't miss your chance to add this Be@rbrick set to your collection today!
